Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed $80,000,000 Series C Convertible Preferred financing and option to acquire Apex Community Clinics, LLC by Northbridge VitalCare, Inc.
Issuer: Northbridge VitalCare, Inc., a Delaware corporation (EIN 58-7392014; DE SOS File No. 9215473) with principal offices at 1200 Alder Park, Suite 400, Newvale, DE 19950.
Investor: Meridian Harbor Bank, N.A. and affiliates (GLBA-regulated), contact: Ms. Lila Sandoval, Managing Director, l.sandoval@meridianharbor.example, +1-212-555-0149.
Company contact: Mr. Darren Cole, CFO, d.cole@northbridgevitalcare.example, +1-415-555-0136.
Security: Series C Convertible Preferred Stock (non-voting until conversion), initial conversion price $7.50; intended listing of underlying common on Mid-Atlantic Stock Exchange (symbol NBVC).
Purchase Price and Funding: $80,000,000 wired to Issuer DDA 8394726154 at Outlook Ridge Bank, ABA 000000000, by 30-Sep-2026; Closing costs capped at $750,000.
Use of Proceeds: expansion of care management platform; no Protected Health Information will be disclosed; any datasets delivered must be de-identified under 45 CFR 164.514.
Selective Disclosure: any presentations to sell-side analysts will comply with Reg FD; material non-public information will be simultaneously furnished via public company disclosure channels.
The parties acknowledge that preliminary Q3 net revenue of $126.4m (unaudited) and draft margin guidance are MNPI; Investor agrees to wall-crossing restrictions and no trading until a cleansing disclosure.
Management Matters: retention bonuses for up to 12 key employees; no individual employee SSNs will be requested at signing (Form Field: [Insert SSN] is not to be completed).
Representations: standard Rule 10b-5, no undisclosed liabilities exceeding $2m, and compliance with banking customer data safeguards (GLBA) for any shared account metadata.
Conditions Precedent: board approval; KYC/CIP including a copy of Mr. Darren Cole’s U.S. Passport No. 712345674 and proof of address dated within 90 days.
General Inquiries (public): 1-800-555-1212 — not a transaction contact; official notices must be sent to ir@northbridgevitalcare.example.
Exclusivity: 45 days; Confidentiality survives; this summary is non-binding except for Confidentiality, Exclusivity, Expenses, and Governing Law (State of Delaware).
